Set B: Used to draw circles or arcs
Answer: Compass → Used to draw circles or arcs
Ruler → Used to draw straight lines

Set B: Divides line into two equal parts
Answer: Perpendicular bisector → Divides line into two equal parts

Set B: Divides angle into two equal parts
Answer: Angle bisector → Divides angle into two equal parts

Set B: All sides equal and all angles 90°
Answer: Square → All sides equal and all angles 90°

Set B: Opposite sides equal and all angles 90°
Answer: Rectangle → Opposite sides equal and all angles 90°

Set B: All sides equal but angles not 90°
Answer: Rhombus → All sides equal but angles not 90°
Parallelogram → Opposite sides equal and parallel
Construct → To draw accurately with instruments

Set B: Line touching circle at one point
Answer: Tangent → Line touching circle at one point
Vertex → Point where two lines meet
